# Docs

- **Introduction**

- [Introduction](/docs): React Native Native — write native modules in Rust, C++, Kotlin, and Swift with hot-reload on device.
- **Getting Started**

- [Installation](/docs/getting-started/installation): Set up React Native Native in your Expo project.
- [Hello World](/docs/getting-started/hello-world): Create your first native component in Rust.
- [Production Builds](/docs/getting-started/production): How native code is bundled for production releases.
- **Guides**

- [Rust](/docs/guides/rust): Write native components and functions in Rust.
- [C++ / ObjC++](/docs/guides/cpp): Write native functions and components in C++ and Objective-C++.
- [Kotlin / Compose](/docs/guides/kotlin): Write native Android components and functions in Kotlin.
- [Swift / SwiftUI](/docs/guides/objc): Write native iOS components and functions in Swift.

- [Troubleshooting](/docs/troubleshooting): Diagnose and fix common React Native Native issues.
